hero.title: Al Pacino
hero.subtitle: Legendary American actor, director, and producer known for his unforgettable performances in cinema history.

about.title: About Al Pacino
about.text: Al Pacino is one of the greatest actors of all time. His career spans more than five decades with iconic roles in films such as The Godfather, Scarface, Heat, and Scent of a Woman.

movies.title: 50+ Movies
movies.text: Al Pacino has starred in dozens of legendary films that shaped modern cinema.

awards.title: Academy Awards
awards.text: He has received numerous awards including an Oscar, Golden Globes, and Emmy Awards.

legacy.title: Cinema Legend
legacy.text: His influence on acting and filmmaking continues to inspire generations worldwide.

quotes.title: Famous Quote
quotes.text: “I don't need bodyguards. I'm from the South Bronx.”
